meta.title: Book a Session | Essentia
meta.description: Book your wellness or medicine session at Essentia Tenerife.

heading: Book a session.
subheading: Choose your service, pick a time, and we will take care of the rest.

memberBlocker.title: Active membership found
memberBlocker.body: This email is linked to an active Essentia membership. Sign in to book with your member benefits.

serviceStep.label: Which service would you like to book?

manual-therapies.title: Manual Therapies
manual-therapies.description: Precise manual work to release tension and restore mobility.

contrast-therapy.title: Contrast Therapy
contrast-therapy.description: Alternating heat and cold to activate recovery and reduce inflammation.

breathing-sessions.title: Breathing Sessions
breathing-sessions.description: Guided breathwork to shift from stress to active recovery.

red-light-therapy.title: Red Light Therapy
red-light-therapy.description: Red and infrared light to stimulate cellular repair and regeneration.

functional-well-being.title: Functional Well-being
functional-well-being.description: Movement and strength training designed around longevity.

hyperbaric-chambers.title: Hyperbaric Oxygen
hyperbaric-chambers.description: Pressurised oxygen to accelerate tissue repair and reduce inflammation.

intravenous-therapy.title: IV Therapy
intravenous-therapy.description: Direct nutrient delivery for rapid absorption and cellular support.

regenerative-medicine.title: Regenerative Medicine
regenerative-medicine.description: Protocols that activate your body's own repair mechanisms.

durationStep.label: Choose a duration
durationStep.fixedDescription: This service has a fixed session type.
durationStep.noneAvailable: No session types available for this service.

locationStep.label: Where would you like to receive the service?

datetimeStep.noSlotsAvailable: No slots available for this date

detailsStep.notesPlaceholder: Any preferences, health considerations, or questions…
detailsStep.notesPlaceholderShort: Anything we should know before your session? (optional)
detailsStep.rightsValue: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection: write to

confirmStep.name: Name
confirmStep.paymentNotice: Once you submit your request, we will contact you by phone or WhatsApp at {phone} to confirm your appointment. Payment will be collected at the center on the day of your session.
confirmStep.paymentNoticePrefix: Once you submit your request, we will contact you by
confirmStep.paymentNoticeSuffix: to confirm your appointment. Payment will be collected at the center on the day of your session.

paymentOverlay.takingYou: We are taking you to the Redsys payment gateway.

successState.heading: Booking requested.
successState.contactNote: We will contact you by phone or WhatsApp at {phone} to confirm your appointment.

confirmation.heading: Booking confirmed.
confirmation.body: Your payment has been processed and your appointment is confirmed. See you soon!
confirmation.contactNote: A confirmation has been sent to your email.
confirmation.contactNoteWithPhone: A confirmation has been sent to your email and to <phone>{phoneValue}</phone>.

requested.heading: Request received.
requested.body: We've received your request and will be in touch shortly to confirm your appointment.
requested.contactNote: Please keep an eye on your email. We will reach out to confirm your appointment.
requested.contactNoteWithPhone: Please keep an eye on your email and phone <phone>{phoneValue}</phone>. We will reach out to confirm your appointment.
